name: engineering-skills
description: Guided engineering workflow skills for clarification, planning, execution, TDD, diagnosis, review, and completion.

interface.shortDescription: Clarify, plan, execute, test, diagnose, review, and finish real engineering work
interface.longDescription: Engineering Skills provides a guided, cross-platform workflow for coding agents: clarify requirements, plan task layers, execute them with behavior-first TDD, diagnose failures by root cause, review work, and verify before completion.
defaultPrompt: I want to build or change something in this project.
Help me diagnose a failing feature or test.
